NAVAREA XIX 65/22
 1. RIGLIST. CORRECT AT 202045 UTC MAY 22
 NORWEGIAN SEA: NORTH OF 65N, EAST OF 5W.

 72-26.9N 020-21.8E TRANSOCEAN ENABLER
 66-04.8N 008-14.9E TRANSOCEAN ENCOURAGE
 65-47.8N 007-34.3E DEEPSEA NORDKAPP
 65-33.1N 007-03.3E TRANSOCEAN NORGE

 NOTES:
 A. RIGS ARE PROTECTED BY A 500 METRE SAFETY ZONE.
 B. FOR RIGS LOCATED SOUTH OF 65N, REFER TO NAVAREA I WARNINGS OR VISIT WWW.UKHO.GOV.UK/RNW
 2. CANCEL NAVAREA XIX　56/22
